gist.headline: Pruning the model tree
gist.blurb: We're doing a bit of spring cleaning in the text API, waving goodbye to the StepFun provider to keep our model lineup focused and streamlined.
gist.summary: Removed the StepFun provider and the step-3.5-flash model from the text generation API to streamline the supported model registry.
gist.impact: The step-3.5-flash model is no longer available, resulting in a cleaner and more focused list of supported text models.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot doing some gentle gardening/pruning of a digital code-plant, representing the removal of an old model to keep the system healthy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's straw hat, gently pruning a glowing digital code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Small pixelated leaves fall softly to the ground. Soft pastel peach and mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
